channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 25.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham: The ‘King of the North’ with No 10 in his sights
item.description: Andy Burnham: The ‘King of the North’ with No 10 in his sights

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Andy Burnham confirms he wants to stand as Labour candidate in Makerfield byelection - UK politics live
item.description: Andy Burnham confirms he wants to stand as Labour candidate in Makerfield byelection - UK politics live

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour winds are blowing towards Burnham – and Streeting knows it
item.description: Labour winds are blowing towards Burnham – and Streeting knows it

item.title: Independent UK Politics: ‘We will change Labour for the better’: Andy Burnham’s full statement as he plots return to Parliament
item.description: ‘We will change Labour for the better’: Andy Burnham’s full statement as he plots return to Parliament

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Nigel Farage bought £1.4m property in cash shortly after receiving £5m gift
item.description: Nigel Farage bought £1.4m property in cash shortly after receiving £5m gift

item.title: BBC Politics: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister
item.description: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Burnham seeks to stand in by-election paving way for Labour leadership challenge
item.description: Starmer latest: Burnham seeks to stand in by-election paving way for Labour leadership challenge

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Will Starmer go – and if so, how? Four scenarios in the battle for No 10
item.description: Will Starmer go – and if so, how? Four scenarios in the battle for No 10

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: No. I am working on the assumption that a) Starmer will not detonate the Labour party by blocking him and 2) even if he wants to, it's not clear he has total control of the NEC anymore. Both highly uncertain conclusi...
item.description: No. I am working on the assumption that a) Starmer will not detonate the Labour party by blocking him and 2) even if he wants to, it's not clear he has total control of the NEC anymore. Both highly uncertain conclusi...

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: Obviously a major challenge to win that seat. An even bigger challenge to win a Reform/Labour marginal while simultaneously securing leadership election support from a left-wing constituency. Whatever else you might t...
item.description: Obviously a major challenge to win that seat. An even bigger challenge to win a Reform/Labour marginal while simultaneously securing leadership election support from a left-wing constituency. Whatever else you might t...
